body:
## Review Summary

This PR is **obsolete**. The file it modifies (`crates/l2/monitor/app.rs`) has been substantially reworked on `main` since this PR was opened:

1. The monitor module was moved to `tooling/` workspace (commit f37651454)
2. `based::sequencer_state::SequencerState` was renamed/moved to `sequencer::sequencer_state::SequencerState`
3. The imports were already partially reorganized differently on `main` (e.g., `RichAccountsTable` is already in its own `use` statement, `SelectableScroller` was consolidated differently)

The PR will have merge conflicts and there's nothing to salvage — the consolidation intent is already addressed by the current `main` import layout. Recommend closing.
